note: v0.6.6 subgraph-aware routing (scoped): a single gated elbow-only avoidSubgraphs pass run first in finishEdges. For an edge whose long interior trunk pierces a container that does NOT hold both endpoints, it pushes the trunk just outside the nearest side (MARGIN=28) and drops a short re-entry near the interior endpoint (APPROACH=30) using the edge's own anchor - computePerimeterPorts untouched (D2=A). Gate: along strictly inside the cross-span AND parallel overlap >= MIN_CROSS=120. Container boxes/membership threaded from the already-computed computeSubgraphBoxes into finishEdges. Mirrored byte-for-byte in the vnmRuntime twin (renderEdges + buildSvg), guarded by dom-runtime-parity. Fires on ONLY architecture.mmd's BE<->RULES (2 edges) corpus-wide; microservices + nested-subgraphs heroes byte-identical, zero snapshot/example churn. Deferred (D1=A): full obstacle-aware routing (diagonal/nested/multi-obstacle). before/ holds the as-is baseline (BE<->RULES impaling the ENGINE container).

diagrams.title: subgraph-aware-routing: As-built - avoidSubgraphs pushes a container-piercing trunk outside the box + re-enters near the interior endpoint, mirrored in the runtime twin
subgraph-aware-routing: the avoidSubgraphs gate + re-route decision flow
